buildCommand: cd packages/db && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema && echo '=== PRISMA ENGINE FILES ===' && find ../../node_modules/.pnpm -name 'libquery_engine*' -type f 2>/dev/null && echo '=== .prisma/client ===' && ls ../../node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@*/node_modules/.prisma/client/*.node 2>/dev/null && echo '=== END ===' && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @gofree/web build
